profiles.description: Use when the operator wants the repo-owned control plane to keep the standing lane moving and rotate to the next child issue automatically.

profiles.summary: Bias toward the current live standing lane.
profiles.description: Use when the current standing PR should be merged before parked-lane expansion continues.

profiles.summary: Treat the current-head regression as the immediate objective.
profiles.description: Use when a required check is red on the live lane and widening scope would just add churn.

profiles.summary: Rebuild the tracked queue before new implementation work.
profiles.description: Use when standing-priority is missing, only epics remain open, or child-issue intake has drifted.

profiles.summary: Use GitHub wait time to prepare one disjoint parked slice.
profiles.description: Use when the live lane is waiting on hosted checks or merge queue only and exactly one parked lane should be prepared.
